whoWeAre.title: Who Are We?
whoWeAre.paragraph1: has been operating since 2013 and from the very beginning has been focused on providing quality services in the industry while keeping prices low.
whoWeAre.paragraph2: is to enable everyone to secure their home or property with the highest-quality materials and modern technology.

professionalTeam.title: Professional Team
professionalTeam.text: Our team specializes in manufacturing and installation and will ensure that every process is carried out to the highest standards!

qualityPriority.title: Quality Is Our Priority
qualityPriority.text: All materials and components used in the manufacturing of garage doors are of top quality.

fastService.title: Fast and Quality Service
fastService.text: We always offer express-fast service and quality throughout the manufacturing and installation of garage doors.

contact.prompt: Have a question or need a quote? Call us or send us a message.

notFound.message: The page you requested does not exist.

intro.p1: are systems that can be easily opened and closed with a remote control or via phone.
intro.p2: They provide {bold} from adverse external elements, and are resistant to corrosion, strong winds, and all harsh weather conditions.
intro.p3: They are fully manufactured from {bold}, guaranteeing long-lasting durability.

comfortSafety.title: Comfort and Safety
comfortSafety.text: Roll-up garage doors are a modern solution for every garage. They offer protection for your garage, property, or home from adverse weather conditions.

quality.title: Quality and Durability
quality.text: Resistant to rain, extreme temperature changes, and corrosion, thanks to high-quality aluminum slats.

spaceEfficiency.title: Minimal Space Requirements
spaceEfficiency.text: Roll-up garage doors are ideal for places where efficient use of ceiling space is needed.

colorRange.title: Wide Range of Colors
colorRange.text: A large selection of colors to choose from depending on your needs.

warranty.answer: Garage doors and components come with a 3-year warranty.

intro.p1: Aluminum pergolas are an excellent solution for stepping out of enclosed spaces and enjoying the outdoors while going about your daily activities.
intro.p2: You can open the pergola at any time if you want more light and airflow, or close it to block external elements.
intro.p3: They are made from high-quality materials that ensure a flawless appearance and high durability.

rainWindProtection.title: Protection from Rain and Wind
rainWindProtection.text: Now you can enjoy every day in comfort without worrying about adverse weather conditions.

quality.text: Resistant to rain, extreme temperature changes, and corrosion, thanks to high-quality materials.

idealSpace.title: The Perfect Space for You
idealSpace.text: Make the space your favorite spot to spend your time.

ambientLighting.title: Ambient Lighting
ambientLighting.text: Create a great atmosphere by adjusting the ambient lighting to suit your needs.

warranty.answer: The warranty for pergolas is 3 years from the date of installation.

intro.p1: PVC magnetic curtains are an excellent solution if you want protection from dust, insects, wind, and other external elements. They also offer excellent thermal and sound insulation.
intro.p2: They fit perfectly in places where there is an increased need for protection from dust, insects, and wind.
intro.p3: They are made from high-quality materials that guarantee complete protection and high durability.

windDustProtection.title: Protection from Wind and Dust
windDustProtection.text: You will no longer feel unpleasant wind and the dust it carries. Magnetic curtains offer complete protection from wind and dust.

insectProtection.title: Protection from Insects
insectProtection.text: Insects are unpleasant and can be very harmful, especially in places where food is stored. You will no longer have to worry about that problem.

anytimeProtection.title: Protection at Any Time
anytimeProtection.text: The curtains are made from quality material, ensuring protection in all adverse external conditions at any time.

colors.title: Various Colors
colors.text: Available in several different colors to choose from depending on your needs.

thermalInsulation.question: Do the curtains provide thermal insulation?
thermalInsulation.answer: Magnetic curtains limit airflow and offer excellent thermal insulation.

extremeTemperatures.question: Are they resistant to extreme temperatures?
extremeTemperatures.answer: The curtains are made from high-quality materials resistant to extreme temperatures.

intro.p1: Wi-Fi controllers are devices used for remote control of garage door or sliding gate motors.
intro.p2: To connect, you only need to establish a connection between the controller and your mobile device, enabling remote control.

easyToUse.title: Practical and Easy to Use
easyToUse.text: Setting up the controllers is easy and straightforward, enabling quick and simple use.

range.question: What is the range of the controller?
range.answer: The controllers have an antenna with high-frequency signals that cover large distances.

intro.p1: The motors are made from high-quality materials and to the highest standards.
intro.p2: High-performance motors have very high speed and come with built-in safety sensors.

highStandard.title: High Standard
highStandard.text: Garage door motors are manufactured in accordance with high standards.

safetySensors.title: Safety Sensors
safetySensors.text: The motors include safety sensors that activate when resistance is detected.

warranty.answer: The warranty on the motors is 3 years.

intro.p1: {bold} sliding gate motors with top performance.
intro.p2: They enable {bold} opening and closing of sliding gates via remote control or mobile phone.
intro.p3: They are fully manufactured from {bold}, guaranteeing long-lasting durability.

highSpeed.title: High Speed
highSpeed.text: Sliding gate motors have high operating speed, enabling fast opening and closing.

wifiControl.title: Wi-Fi Control
wifiControl.text: You can control them anytime and from anywhere via your mobile device. All you need is to connect the device to the motor via Wi-Fi.

topQuality.title: Top Quality
topQuality.text: The motors are made exclusively from high-quality materials.

warranty.answer: The motors come with a 1-year warranty.

rainResistant.question: Are they rain-resistant?
rainResistant.answer: The motors are certified for rain resistance to IP standard.

motors.title: Motors
motors.text: High-speed motors that open your door in no time.

axles.title: Axles
axles.text: Garage door axles with lengths up to 7m.

slats.title: Slats
slats.text: Multiple types of slats for manufacturing garage doors.

otherParts.title: Other Components
otherParts.text: We stock all components needed to manufacture the products in our range.

motoriPortiHub.title: Sliding Gate Motors
motoriPortiHub.metaDescription: Spanish and Italian sliding gate motors — choose the model that fits your needs.
motoriPortiHub.intro: Choose a motor type — Spanish model with Wi-Fi or Italian OXYGEN complete packages, each with its own features.

motoriSpanish.title: Spanish Sliding Gate Motors
motoriSpanish.metaDescription: Ultra-fast Spanish sliding gate motor with Wi-Fi control — capacity up to 800 kg.

intro.p1: Ultra-fast Spanish sliding gate motors with top performance.
intro.p2: Enable fast and unobstructed opening and closing via remote control or mobile phone.
intro.p3: Fully manufactured from high-quality materials, guaranteeing long-lasting durability.

models.title: Model:
models.item1: Motor with capacity up to 800 kg

speed.title: Ultra-Fast Operation
speed.text: High operating speed — ideal when you use the gate frequently.

wifi.title: Wi-Fi Control
wifi.text: Control via mobile phone, no additional hardware required.

capacity.title: High Capacity
capacity.text: One model with capacity up to 800 kg — suitable for most sliding gates.

warranty.answer: The motors come with a 1-year warranty.

rainResistant.question: Are they rain-resistant?
rainResistant.answer: The motors are certified for rain resistance to IP standard.

motoriItalian.title: Italian Sliding Gate Motors
motoriItalian.metaDescription: Italian OXYGEN sliding gate motors — complete package from €300 with control panel, remotes, photocells, and 4 m of rails.

intro.p1: Italian OXYGEN motors — 100% Made in Italy with proven quality.
intro.p2: Complete package from €300 — motor with control panel, remotes, photocells, flasher, and 4 m of rails.
intro.p3: Quiet and stable operation, designed for gates up to 600 kg.

quality.title: Italian Quality
quality.text: Premium build and components — proven reliability on the European market.

quiet.title: Quiet Operation
quiet.text: Optimized mechanism — smooth opening and closing without unnecessary noise.

complete.title: Complete Solution
complete.text: Everything needed for installation is in the package — fewer additional orders.

warranty.answer: The motors come with a 1-year warranty.

rainResistant.question: Are they rain-resistant?
rainResistant.answer: The motors are certified for rain resistance to IP standard.
